title: atriplex hastata var. prostrata
intro: Atriplex hastata var. prostrata, also known as spreading saltbush, is a low-growing, spreading shrub native to Australia and New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, derived from its leaves and stems. The health benefits of Atriplex hastata var. prostrata include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal applications.
